title: portulaca psammotropha
intro: Portulaca psammotropha, also known as the sand rose or desert rose, is a succulent plant species belonging to the Portulacaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Portulaca psammotropha include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and supporting immune function. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications such as salves and ointments.
